title: Andhadhun
tmdbOverview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Andhadhun is a crime, mystery and thriller film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
